violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the food carts/racks located in the back storage room and retail coolers have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
Inspector observed bags of trash and other debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The floors in the back storage area and under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
